# Transcrição: Please_STOP_Saying_This_To_Yourself

- **Fonte:** Please_STOP_Saying_This_To_Yourself
- **Duração:** 01:59
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:59]

I hate my voice. I sound boring. I have no presence. I have no authority or credibility when I talk. I always mumble. Ugh, I am so monotone. I see comments like this on my videos all the time on social media. We are so mean to ourselves and we make judgments about how we communicate as if they're permanent and I don't mean to get philosophical with you but I'm going to get philosophical with you. Nothing is permanent. You are not permanent. I am not permanent. The things we own are not permanent. Even a bloody permanent marker isn't permanent. Everything in life is temporary. Even the harsh judgments. I mean especially the harsh judgments you make about yourself. I really want you to anchor this into your mind. All of the mean judgments that you make about yourself, they are all temporary. Let's take one example or let's take multiple examples. I sound boring. Well let's add more melody to your voice. I have no presence, Vim. Well let's use bigger body language when you talk. I hate my voice, Vim. Well let's learn how to train this instrument so you learn how to play it more beautifully. The moment we make judgments about ourselves as if they're permanent, do you know what happens? We no longer try to change anything. We just give up and we lose all hope. I'm here to remind you that again nothing is permanent and everything in this life is temporary. I'm here to remind you in case no one's told you recently. You are more capable than you think. You have more potential in you than you think and you are more amazing than you realize. If you've been struggling with your communication skills specifically and you're new to my content, then I've decided to put on one more free master class on communication skills. Come join me. I've put the link in the comment section below. Click that link to be able to register. Can't wait to see you at the final Master Class for 2023.
